title: Supporting Syria’s future: guidance for businesses and NGOs
body: "This guidance is for:    UK businesses with an interest in investing, trading, and operating in Syria  UK aid organisations that support humanitarian and recovery work    It provides updates and guidance on the following relevant legislation:    the sanctions regimes that apply in Syria  the terrorism legislation (proscribed organisations) which applies to Syria the humanitarian provisions, exemptions, and general licences applicable to Syria  "
